hdatools 0.2.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Using branded ggplot2 themes
  • Changelog

Package index

Themes

ggplot2 themes for HDAdvisors, HousingForward Virginia, and PHA projects.

theme_hda()
Use an HDAdvisors-branded ggplot2 theme
theme_hfv()
Use a HousingForward Virginia-branded ggplot2 theme
theme_pha()
Use a PHA-branded ggplot2 theme

Palettes & scales

Discrete and continuous color palettes and ggplot2 scale functions.

hda_pal_discrete()
Generate a discrete HDA color palette
hfv_pal_discrete()
Generate a discrete HFV color palette
pha_pal_discrete()
Generate a discrete PHA color palette
scale_color_hda()
HDA-branded discrete color scale
scale_color_hfv()
HFV-branded discrete color scale
scale_color_pha()
PHA-branded discrete color scale
scale_fill_hda()
HDA-branded discrete fill scale
scale_fill_hfv()
HFV-branded discrete fill scale
scale_fill_pha()
PHA-branded discrete fill scale
scale_color_gradient_hda()
HDA-branded 4-color continuous color scale
scale_color_gradient_pha()
PHA-branded 4-color continuous color scale
scale_fill_gradient_pha()
PHA-branded 4-color continuous fill scale

Helpers

Theme utilities, font registration, and output helpers.

register_hda_fonts()
Register hdatools' bundled fonts for use in plots and knitr output
flip_gridlines()
Flip default major gridlines from horizontal to vertical
add_zero_line()
Add darker line to zero intercept
adjust_base_size()
Adjust base size for different output formats
get_output_format()
Determine the current output format
get_logo()
Get a logo for use in a ggplot2 plot
publish_plot()
Create dynamic graphic from plot object when document rendered as HTML
markdown_wrap_gen()
Generate a function to wrap and format facet labels with markdown

Analysis utils

General-purpose analytical utilities for housing data workflows.

add_reliability()
Add reliability labels based on coefficient of variation
fct_case_when()
Create a factor with case_when logic and automatic level ordering

On this page

Developed by Jonathan Knopf, Kyle Walker, Eric Mai.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
